_comment: Reference template for the active CrossExtend-KG runtime schema
_description: Copy this file into config/persistent/ and replace values as needed.

prompts._comment: Paths are resolved relative to this config file

backbone._comment: Shared predefined backbone plus optional curated additions from domains[].ontology_seed_path

seed_descriptions.Asset: industrial asset, machine, line, robot, battery pack, assembly, cabinet, robotic arm, control system, main equipment
seed_descriptions.Component: part, module, bearing, reducer, lock, cooling module, hardware component, subassembly part
seed_descriptions.Task: maintenance or operational task, inspection task, calibration task, shutdown task, work order
seed_descriptions.Signal: alarm, warning, telemetry, sensor reading, sensor signal, vibration signal, torque signal, temperature signal, flow signal
seed_descriptions.State: operating state, normal state, abnormal state, status condition, overload state, shortage status
seed_descriptions.Fault: fault, failure, defect, damage, deviation, drift, anomaly root issue
seed_descriptions.MaintenanceAction: repair, replacement action, reset action, recalibration action, power-off operation, refueling action, maintenance action
seed_descriptions.Document: report, ticket, document, manual, work order document, operation log, maintenance manual

relations._comment: All relation mentions must map into one of these families

family_descriptions.task_dependency: dependency edges between assets, tasks, and actions

data._comment: Synthetic generation is optional; main runs normally consume preprocessed EvidenceRecord JSON

runtime._comment: Artifact export, retrieval, memory-bank, and graph-validation settings

variants.description: LLM attachment with embedding retrieval, rule filtering, snapshots, and memory bank

domains._comment: All domains are application cases; role must stay target
